title: Manage The Day (MTD) – AI Productivity Platform
details: Production-grade **cross-platform productivity platform** (iOS, Android, and Web) built from a single Flutter codebase at Connecting Points Tech — managing tasks, projects, goals, and daily activities across life pillars such as work, fitness, and family.

Engineered a **unified multi-provider calendar** on Syncfusion that merges MTD, **Google, Apple (CalDAV/iCloud), Microsoft 365, and on-device iOS (EventKit)** events — with drag & drop, resizing, recurrence, and colour-coded cross-calendar sync.
Built a **voice + text AI assistant** (FastAPI + Google Agent Development Kit) that manages tasks, events, goals, and pillars, and **auto-schedules** work onto the calendar from natural language.
Shipped **iOS Live Activities** — Dynamic Island and lock-screen timers for active focus sessions — plus a Task Cloud (kanban), Pillars, Goals, Projects, Focus Time, and day-tracking heatmaps.
Managed global state with **BLoC + Provider + Riverpod**, and integrated Firebase Auth, Firestore, Storage, Analytics, and Google OAuth 2.0 for secure, real-time, data-driven functionality.

title: Crooze – Fitness Challenge App
details: Built features for a **community-driven fitness app** where users join cycling, walking, and club challenges hosted by admins to earn rewards and certificates.
Delivered **Community, Club, and Individual challenge** modules, a **Leaderboard** system, challenge-summary views, and automated **certificate generation**.
Integrated a **GraphQL API** for efficient, high-performance data retrieval, reducing over-fetching across challenge and profile screens.
Improved stability by fixing crash loops, null-handling, and data-sync issues, and tuned performance across the app.

title: AgreEasy – B2B Agriculture Platform
details: Contributed to **AgreEasy**, a B2B platform connecting farmers directly with hotels and restaurants for crop and produce trading.
Built and optimized **Farmer Authentication**, **Profile Management**, and **Land Registration** modules end to end.
Added **localization** for multilingual support, making the app more inclusive for regional farmers.
Optimized the issue-reporting/ticketing system, fixed notification bugs, and eliminated memory leaks for smoother state handling.

title: SimbaCourse – Education Management App
details: Built a complete **education management system** for SimbaQuartz connecting admins, teachers, and students end to end.
Handled both **frontend and backend** from scratch — Flutter for the mobile client and Express.js + MongoDB for the API.
Enabled course creation, enrolment, progress tracking, and in-app communication across all three user roles.
Delivered during an engineering internship, covering the project from data model to shipped mobile app.
